hero.headline:
Your Dream Outdoor Space Built to
Last
hero.subheadline: After 25 years building porches, decks, and patios across metro Atlanta, we know what makes an outdoor space truly worth living in. From the first sketch to the final nail, our design-build team handles everything so you can simply enjoy your backyard.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Outdoor Living Spaces That<br class="hidden md:block"> Become Your Favorite Room
services.subtitle: From screened porches that keep the bugs out to outdoor kitchens that bring the family together, we design and build every element of your perfect backyard retreat.

cards.title: Screened Porch Construction
cards.description: Custom screened porches that extend your living space outdoors while keeping bugs and weather at bay. Premium materials, expert craftsmanship, built to last decades.

cards.title: Deck Building & Design
cards.description: Custom decks designed to complement your home's architecture and maximize your outdoor enjoyment. Quality materials and construction that stands up to Georgia weather.

cards.title: Patio Construction
cards.description: Beautiful patios built with pavers, natural stone, or stamped concrete. We create the perfect outdoor entertaining and relaxation area tailored to your lifestyle.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchen Design
cards.description: Fully equipped outdoor kitchens with built-in grills, countertops, sinks, and storage. Everything you need to make backyard entertaining effortless.

cards.title: Sunrooms & 3-Season Rooms
cards.description: Year-round enclosed living spaces flooded with natural light. Enjoy the outdoors from the comfort of a climate-controlled room, rain or shine.

cards.title: Pergolas, Gazebos & Fire Features
cards.description: Custom shade structures, fireplaces, and fire pits that add warmth, style, and architectural beauty to your outdoor living space year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home, listen to your vision, assess your space, and discuss your budget. You'll receive a detailed design proposal with transparent pricing — no surprises, no pressure.

steps.title: We Design & Build Everything
steps.description: Our in-house team handles the entire project — design, permitting, materials, and construction. One point of contact, one team, from first sketch to final walkthrough.

steps.title: Enjoy Your New Outdoor Living Space
steps.description: Your backyard transforms into the room you never want to leave. Built with quality materials and backed by our craftsmanship warranty, your new space is made to last.

about.label: Why Atlanta Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: 25 Years of Building Outdoor Spaces Atlanta Families Love
about.description: Since 2001, Atlanta Porch & Patio has been the metro area's go-to design-build firm for porches, decks, and outdoor living spaces. We're not a general contractor who dabbles in outdoor projects — this is all we do. Every project is managed from consultation through completion by our own team, ensuring the craftsmanship and attention to detail that have earned us over 100 five-star reviews and lasting relationships with homeowners across Marietta, Roswell, Buckhead, and beyond.

features.title: Licensed General Contractor
features.description: Fully licensed in the state of Georgia with BBB accreditation and NADRA membership. Your project is in qualified, insured hands from day one.

features.title: One Team, Start to Finish
features.description: No subcontractor roulette. Our in-house crew handles design, permitting, and construction so nothing falls through the cracks.

features.title: Craftsmanship Warranty
features.description: We stand behind every project we build. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — that's been our promise for 25 years.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Costs.
pricing.subtitle: Every proposal includes a detailed scope of work, material specs, and timeline. What we quote is what you pay — no change-order surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of your project doesn't meet the standards we agreed on, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on integrity and craftsmanship for over 25 years, and every project carries that same commitment. Your satisfaction isn't a line item — it's the foundation of everything we build.

faqs.question: How long does a typical porch or deck project take?
faqs.answer: Most screened porch and deck projects take 4-8 weeks from design approval to completion, depending on scope and permitting timelines. Larger outdoor living packages with kitchens or fireplaces may take 8-12 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage all permit applications and coordinate with your HOA if needed. As a licensed general contractor in Georgia, we know the local building codes and ensure every project meets or exceeds requirements.

faqs.question: What areas in Atlanta do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire metro Atlanta area from our Marietta headquarters, including Roswell, Buckhead, Kennesaw, Alpharetta, Johns Creek, Woodstock, Smyrna, Sandy Springs, Dunwoody, and East and West Cobb.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to offer flexible payment plans. During your consultation, we'll discuss budget-friendly options so you can get the outdoor living space you want without the financial stress.

faqs.question: Can you work with an existing porch or deck?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We frequently renovate, repair, and expand existing outdoor structures. Whether you want to screen in an open porch, resurface a deck, or add features to your patio, we'll assess the existing structure and recommend the best path forward.

testimonials.name: Hillary D.
testimonials.text: We just finished our screened in porch and could not be happier! Judy was fantastic — very communicative and clear. The craftsmanship is exactly what we hoped for.

testimonials.name: Drew M.
testimonials.text: I have worked with Atlanta Porch and Patio for over 10 years now. The team over there has always been super professional and responsive. They are my go-to for any outdoor project.

testimonials.name: Andrew E.
testimonials.text: We recently worked with Atlanta Porch and Patio to build a stunning custom 3-Season Screened Porch. The craftsmanship is top-notch and the attention to detail exceeded our expectations.

contact.headline:
Ready to Love Your
Backyard Again?
contact.subtitle: Get a free on-site consultation with a detailed design proposal. No pressure, no obligations — just 25 years of outdoor living expertise at your service.
